title: tilmia disticha
intro: Tilmia disticha, also known as Tiliacora dielsiana, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its distinct bipinnate leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Tilmia disticha include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, such as malaria and tuberculosis. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used as a herbal tea or added to various herbal preparations.
